releases.label: DR4
releases.summary: Fourth and final data release of the DEEP2 Galaxy Redshift Survey (DEIMOS on Keck II): all spectra and the complete redshift catalog (zcat) with 52,989 entries (50,319 unique objects), nearly 53,000 spectra and more than 38,000 reliable redshift measurements (ZQUALITY >= 3) over 2.8 deg2 in four fields, to a limiting magnitude R_AB = 24.1, targeting galaxies primarily at z ~ 0.7-1.4.
